HR: Limestone karst islets; drowned gorges opening to a narrow shelf sea
HT: Mountainous peninsulas; arid rain-shadow basins west of humid Atlantic ridges
HU: Pannonian basin ringed by forested hills; loess over flat alluvial plains
ID: Volcanic arcs above trenches; monsoon rainforest between narrow inter-island seas
IE: Metamorphic cliffs on an Atlantic seaboard; blanket bogs over drumlin-smoothed shields
IL: Coastal plain at limestone foothills; southern dunes on arid basement shields
IN: Monsoon scarps over peninsular shields; braided rivers on thick northern alluvial fans
IQ: Marsh maze between twin river belts; westward desert plateaus above basin floors
IR: Fold ridges above interior salt desert; snowy northern ranges above a humid littoral
IS: Basalt plate with rift fissures; glaciers in fjords beside geothermal steam fields
IT: Limestone spine, foredeep plains; active volcanoes on a curved convergent margin
JM: Cockpit karst on humid uplands; mist-forest scarps above coral reef shelves
JO: Sandstone wadis and rose cliffs; gulf littoral backed by inland basalt lava fields
JP: Trench off volcanic arcs; steep forested ranges on narrow coastal benches
KE: Rift scarps above soda lakes; ice-capped equatorial volcano over high moorlands
KG: Tien Shan icefields ribbon moraine lakes; alpine pastures between glacier troughs
KH: Seasonally flooding lake plain; low sediment basin threaded by shifting braided channels
KI: Coral atolls on equatorial rises; coconut islets on lagoon flats with fringing reef rims
KM: Volcanic cones in wet tropics; trade clouds on east scarps and fringing reefs
KN: Twin volcanic islands; wet windward ridges, salt ponds in leeward saddles
KP: Granite coast ranges; steep eastern scarps catch monsoon on ocean-facing slopes
KR: Rugged granite spine under monsoon clouds; rocky skerries across narrow shelf seas
KW: Shallow gulf head silting from wadis; sabkhas and tidal creeks on a shelved coast
KZ: Cold steppe between closed basins; dune ridges on shores of shallow salt sinks
LA: Tower karst on forest ridges; monsoon gorges above broad muddy river terraces
